title: daphne altaica subsp. fasciculiflora
intro: Daphne altaica subsp. fasciculiflora, also known as the Korean daphne, is a shrub-like plant in the family Thymelaeaceae. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial properties, derived from its essential oils and alkaloids. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and reduce stress. The herbal preparations of Daphne altaica subsp. fasciculiflora include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
